attacking_style: Early breakaway specialist who targets KOM points in first half of races, launching solo or small group efforts well beyond 100km from finish on mountain stages.
team_tactics: Operates with autonomy in early breaks without visible team support; appears assigned to collect KOM points while teams behind control pace for sprinters/GC riders.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with early categorized climbs where KOM points are available before peloton organizing chase; benefits from controlled race scenarios where break is permitted long leash.
vulnerability: Mechanicals have disrupted two observed long-range efforts; lacks firepower to stay away once peloton commits to organized chase in final 35km; dependent on teams granting freedom.
key_patterns: Targets early breakaways specifically for KOM point accumulation, successful in both observed races.
Sustains 100km+ solo or small group efforts before organized peloton catch.
Mechanicals disrupted both observed breakaway attempts (12km and 100km+ marks).
Caught within final 35km window when peloton executes controlled chase.
form_trajectory: neutral: Successfully executing breakaway/KOM strategy consistently but mechanicals prevented testing true staying power; role appears defined rather than form-dependent
